records.summary: Weekly class schedule page with location and teacher filters for two Berlin studios. The schedule widget appears to be embedded via a third-party tool (Yogo) but no actual class times or styles are visible in the scraped content.
records.notes: Schedule widget is present but renders no visible class data in the page content, and there are no prices or style descriptions — visitors cannot answer 'when can I come' without the widget loading correctly.

records.summary: Pricing and booking page listing all pass options including a €20 drop-in, €49 two-week trial, multi-class packs, memberships, and partner integrations (ClassPass, Wellpass, Wellhub). Prices and booking links are clearly displayed.
records.notes: Pricing is clear and a first-timer trial pass is prominently shown, but there are no class styles listed and no schedule on this page, so visitors still can't see what classes are available or when.

records.summary: Studio locations page describing two Berlin spaces — Prenzlauer Berg (Kastanienallee 63) and Kreuzberg Waterfront (Falckensteinstr 47) — with addresses, directions links, facility details, and studio rental info.
records.notes: Addresses and directions are clearly provided which is good for local SEO and visitor navigation, but there are no class styles, schedule, or drop-in prices on this page — studio rental pricing muddies the drop-in focus.
